top.name: Runic Cascade
top.rules_text: Prepare a glyph within 4. When it triggers, it prepares a copy of itself on 2 adjacent tiles.

bottom.name: Glyph Warp
bottom.rules_text: Swap the positions of 2 of your prepared glyphs (their effects move with them).

upgrades.description: The cascade hits harder. The warp triggers on arrival.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4 (6 damage). When it triggers, it copies onto 2 adjacent tiles.
Swap 2 of your prepared glyphs, then trigger both.

upgrades.description: Chain Cascade: copies trigger immediately on creation.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4 (6). On trigger, copies onto 2 adjacent tiles which trigger at once.

upgrades.description: Glyph Shift: swap 3 glyphs in a chain.

changes.value: Rotate the positions of 3 of your glyphs, then trigger all 3.

upgrades.description: Spreading Cascade: copies to 3 tiles and slows.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4 (6, slow). On trigger, copies onto 3 adjacent tiles which trigger at once.

upgrades.description: Glyph Warp: also banks Weave per glyph triggered.

changes.value: Rotate 3 of your glyphs, then trigger all 3. Gain 1 Weave per glyph triggered.

upgrades.description: Wildfire Runes: an unstoppable, self-perpetuating chain.

changes.value: Prepare a reusable glyph (7, root). On trigger it copies onto 3 adjacent tiles which trigger at once.

upgrades.description: Reweave: rearrange the whole web and detonate it.

changes.value: Rearrange all your glyphs, then trigger every one. Gain 1 Weave per glyph, plus 1.
